## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Linked Issue

Closes #

## Type

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] QA / tests

## Validation

Describe the checks performed:

- [ ] Automated tests
- [ ] Manual browser/API check
- [ ] Markdown or Mermaid validation
- [ ] Not applicable

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and easy to review
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are met
- [ ] Documentation was updated if needed
- [ ] Mermaid diagrams follow `docs/MERMAID.md` if diagrams were added or changed
- [ ] Security or privacy impact was considered
- [ ] Tests or manual checks were completed
- [ ] Screenshots or logs are attached when useful

## Notes for Reviewers

Add screenshots, risks, follow-up work, or anything reviewers should know.
